name: Chocolate Ecstasy
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease a 9-inch springform pan. Line the bottom with parchment paper.
3. In a 2-quart glass bowl, combine 3/4 cup sugar and 1/3 cup water.
4. Heat in microwave on HIGH for 1 1/2 minutes or until boiling.
5. Stir in semi-sweet chocolate and unsweetened chocolate until melted.
6. Add butter to the chocolate mixture and stir until smooth.
7. In a medium bowl, beat eggs and remaining 1/4 cup sugar with an electric mixer on high speed until double in volume (about 3-4 minutes).
8. Stir the egg mixture into the chocolate mixture until well blended.
9. Pour batter into prepared pan.
10. Wrap springform pan in larger rectangular baking pan filled with water up to an inch.
11. Bake for 45 minutes or until set.
12. Remove pan from water, let cool in pan and refrigerate.
